title: LegacyTrack
description: A pair of small resource packs that remaps all music sound events to play C418 music like how it is on the legacy console editions of Minecraft. This project aims to only resource packs to accomplish this task.
body:
A pair of small resource packs that remaps all music sound events to play C418 music like how it is on the legacy editions of Minecraft. This project aims to only resource packs to accomplish this task.


[![GitHub Downloads](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/rkkoya/LegacyTrack/total?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&color=006ca5)](https://github.com/RKKOYA/LegacyTrack/releases) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/6Ptdj5WF?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=008000)](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacytrack) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1421832?style=for-the-badge&logo=CurseForge&color=orange)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/legacytrack)
## Goals The project aims to play the Minecraft background music as follows: * Main Menu: - Beginning 2 - Floating Trees - Moog City 2 - Mutation * Survival (every biome minus deepdark): - Clark - Danny - Dry Hands - Haggstrom - Key - Living Mice - Mice on Venus - Minecraft - Wet Hands - Oxygene - Subwoofer Lullaby - Sweden * Creative (every biome including underwater): - Aria Math - Biome Fest - Blind Spots - Dreiton - Haunt Muskie - Taswell * Nether (every biome) - Chrysopoeia - Rubedo - So Below - Dead Voxel - Concrete Halls - Warmth - Ballad of the Cats * Underwater (UNCHANGED for survival, CHANGED for creative) * End (UNCHANGED) ## Installation 1. Download both LegacyTrack.zip and LegacyTrackC.zip from the versions tab. 2. Move those two .zip folders over to the minecraft resourcepacks folder. 3. In the game, navigate to options -> resourcepacks and load LegacyTrack. In creative mode, load LegacyTrackC on top of LegacyTrack; unload LegacyTrackC when switching back to survival mode.
Survival Creative
## Copyright * All C418 soundtracks belong to [Daniel Rosenfield](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/C418).
